title: Star Wars: The Making of Episode I The Phantom Menace
content:
{{Top|rwm|leg|ref|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace}} {{ReferenceBook |image=[[File:Making_of_Episode_I.jpg]] |title=''Star Wars: The Making of
Episode I The Phantom Menace'' |author=*[[Laurent Bouzereau]] *[[Jody Duncan]] |cover artist=*[[Keith Hamshere]] *[[Giles Keyte]] *[[Jonathan Fisher]] |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=*[[Del Rey]] {{C|US}} *[[Random House]] {{C|UK}} *[[Ebury Press]] {{C|UK}} |release date=[[May 10]], [[1999]]{{RandomHouseOld|url=author/results.pperl?authorid=2885|text=Laurent Bouzereau}} |type=*Hardcover *Paperback |pages=192 |dimensions= |weight= |isbn=0345431111, 0345431197 |series= |preceded by= |followed by= }} '''''Star Wars: The Making of Episode I The Phantom Menace''''' is a reference book co-authored by [[Laurent Bouzereau]] and [[Jody Duncan]]. It was published by [[Del Rey]] for the United States and by [[Random House]] for the United Kingdom in [[May]] [[1999]]. [[Ebury Press]] also released a Limited First Edition paperback and a Special Collector's Limited Edition hardcover for the UK. ==Publisher's summary== '''The Ultimate Behind-the-Scenes Tour de Force''' In 1977, George Lucas brought ''Star Wars'' to the big screen—and made cinema history. Now, more than twenty years later, the visionary writer-director, his brilliant crew of special-effects wizards, and an exciting cast of talented stars have united to make the long-awaited and eagerly anticipated Episode I of the ''Star Wars'' epic. ''Star Wars: The Making of Episode I'' is your exclusive entrée backstage where the wonders of the newest chapter in the ''Star Wars'' saga are brought to life, including *A series of exclusive interviews with George Lucas as he discusses the genesis of the ''Star Wars'' story, from themes to scenes to dialogue *The development of such classic characters as young Jedi student Obi-Wan Kenobi and R2-D2—''plus'' intriguing newcomers Anakin Skywalker, Qui-Gon Jinn, Queen Amidala, and Jar Jar Binks *The creation of new state-of-the-art creatures and special effects by the legendary Industrial Light & Magic team *Pre-production: from storyboarding, set-building, and model-making to costume design and the casting of pivotal roles *Post-production: Including editing, scoring, and combining computer generated effects with live-action footage *Shooting in England, Italy, and Tunisia, with stars Liam Neeson, Ewan McGregor, and Natalie Portman *Hundreds of drawings and photographs Witness all the movie-making magic behind the sensational ''Star Wars'' saga's newest episode! ==Continuity== *On page 117, a caption for a photograph of the model of an [[Armored Assault Tank/Legends|AAT]] misidentifies it as an [[Multi-Troop Transport/Legends|MTT]] model. ==Media== {{Mediacat|from=1|imagecat=Images from Star Wars: The Making of Episode I The Phantom Menace}} ===Editions=== *{{ISBN|0-345-43111-1}}, May [[1999]], [[Del Rey]], US hardcover *{{ISBN|0-345-43119-7}}, May 1999, Del Rey, US paperback *{{ISBN|0-09-1868-67-X}}, May 1999, [[Ebury Press]], UK Limited First Edition paperback *{{ISBN|0-09-1869-45-5}}, May 1999, Ebury Press, UK Special Collector's Limited Edition hardcover ===Cover gallery=== File:Making_of_Episode_I.jpg|Hardcover, paperback File:MakingofTPM-LimitedFirstEdition.jpg|Limited First Edition File:MakingofTPM-SpecialCollectorsLimitedEdition.png|Special Collector's Limited Edition File:Making_of_Episode_I_Pl.jpg|Polish - ''Gwiezdne Wojny: Część I. Mroczne Widmo - Jak powstawał film'' ==Sources== *{{CollectorCite|6|Books with Bite}} *{{InsiderCite|44|Bookshelf|''Star Wars'' Bookshelf}} *{{SW|url=news/25-fun-facts-the-phantom-menace|text=25 Things You Probably Didn't Know About the Making of ''Star Wars: The Phantom Menace''}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Episode1Multimedia}} {{Interlang |de=The Making of Episode I – Die dunkle Bedrohung |fr=Star Wars : Le Making Épisode I : La Menace Fantôme |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები, ეპიზოდი I: ფარული მუქარა: შექმნა |pl=Mroczne widmo: Jak powstawał film |sr=Star Wars: The Making of Episode I: The Phantom Menace }} [[Category:Making of books]]
